news.t: Insurance Stocks Gain Ground in Wild Markets. Boring Might Be the Way to Go.
Insurance Stocks Do Just Fine Amid Harsh Weather

holdings.infoBox: IAK is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Progressive Corporation stock at N/A, Chubb at N/A, The Travelers Companies at N/A, The Allstate Corporation at N/A, and MetLife at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Insurance ETF (IAK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DJ US Select / Insurance index. The fund tracks a market-cap index of US insurance companies. IAK was launched on May 1, 2006 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Insurance Stocks Do Just Fine Amid Harsh Weather
data.text: Strange as it sounds, heat waves and car accidents might be good for your portfolio.

data.title: Potomac Wealth's Mark Avallone likes financials, particularly insurance, heading into 2023
data.text: Mark Avallone, Potomac Wealth Advisors president, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss positioning in 2023.
